sglang.title: Fix streaming
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Remove the useless incomplete_str.
The length of printable text returned by find_printable_text is not monotonically increasing(when there are Chinese characters and spaces). This PR fixes a bug in openai style adapter.

sglang.title: Reduce number of workspaces for flashinfer
sglang.author: wisclmy0611

vllm.title: add benchmark for fix length input and output
vllm.author: haichuan1221
vllm.bodyExcerpt: vllm only support benchmark for sonnet and sharegpt dataset, but the input and output length is not fixed; in the contribution, I use random sample to evealuate the benchmark of fixed input length and output length

vllm.title: [ Misc ] Support Fp8 via `llm-compressor`
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

refactors fp8 utilities for shared use across autofp8, compressed-tensors, nvidia-ammo
adds support for compressed-tensors Fp8 models (dense only)

Relevant PR: main...pavanimajety:vllm:ammo_ckpt_rev2

cc @pavanimajety this will help land nvidia-ammo

TEST PLAN:

added regression test to l

vllm.title: [misc][frontend] log all available endpoints
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fixes #6194
quite a lot users don't know the difference between simple api server and openai api server. I got several issue reports recently, that users are manually getting /generate from openai api server, or getting /v1/models from simple api server, and then complain about 404 response.
logging

vllm.title: do not exclude `object` field in CompletionStreamResponse
vllm.author: kczimm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The CompletionStreamResponse contains the required object field but is subsequently removed when serializing to JSON.
This PR retains the required object field.
